creator: maniactraq@gmail.com
text:
Building package for devel/readline fails with error:

tar: lib/libhistory.so.6: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/libhistory.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/libreadline.so.6: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: lib/libreadline.so: Cannot stat: No such file or directory
tar: Error exit delayed from previous errors.
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/devel/readline/ && make install && pkg_create -b /var/db/pkg/readline-6.2_1/
